cn_title: Xbox新主管承认展示会上放PS5标志是失误：「这是我的责任」
subtitle: 面子得给
opus_summary: Xbox新任负责人阿莎·夏尔玛就微软在Xbox游戏展示会上继续展示竞争平台PS5标志的决定做出回应，承认「这是一次失误，我承担责任」，并表示正在讨论如何调整未来的展示方式。此前Xbox内容官Matt Booty确认6月7日的展示会将延续标注所有平台的做法。由于索尼并不会在自家State of Play中展示Xbox标志，这种不对等引发了核心粉丝的不满。夏尔玛自接任Phil Spencer以来一直在推动Xbox品牌重塑，面临着在保持多平台策略的同时留住核心粉丝的艰难挑战。

images.caption: 同一款《神鬼寓言》预告片在Xbox YouTube频道上展示了所有平台标志

paragraphs.en: Xbox boss Asha Sharma has reacted to negative feedback at Microsoft's decision to continue to show competing platform logos at its upcoming Xbox Games Showcase, suggesting it will stop doing so for future shows.
paragraphs.cn: Xbox负责人阿莎·夏尔玛就微软决定在即将到来的Xbox游戏展示会上继续展示竞争平台标志一事回应了负面反馈，并暗示未来的展示会将停止这一做法。

paragraphs.en: Sharma, who took over as boss of Xbox from Phil Spencer earlier this year, has embarked upon a rebrand of the gaming business in a bid to get core Xbox fans back onside following years of disenchantment. Early decisions include the end of the controversial 'This is an Xbox' marketing campaign, quickfire new Xbox console features, and switching from 'Xbox' to 'XBOX' in official branding.
paragraphs.cn: 夏尔玛于今年早些时候从Phil Spencer手中接管Xbox，随后开始对游戏业务进行品牌重塑，以期在多年的失望情绪后重新赢回核心Xbox粉丝。早期决策包括终止争议不断的「This is an Xbox」营销活动、快速推出新的Xbox主机功能，以及将官方品牌从「Xbox」改为「XBOX」。

paragraphs.en: But yesterday, following the delay of Fable to early 2027, Microsoft confirmed it would "continue the precedent" by highlighting competing platforms during its 2026 Xbox Showcase on June 7. Xbox chief content officer Matt Booty set the stage during an appearance on the Official Xbox Podcast, telling fans to expect the company to be transparent about what platforms its games are coming to, meaning you'll probably see a PlayStation logo or two pop up.
paragraphs.cn: 但就在昨天，继《神鬼寓言》宣布延期至2027年初后，微软确认将在6月7日的2026 Xbox展示会上「延续惯例」，标注竞争平台信息。Xbox首席内容官Matt Booty在官方Xbox播客中表示，粉丝们应该预期公司会透明地展示游戏登陆的所有平台——这意味着你很可能会看到PlayStation标志出现。

paragraphs.en: "We'll be very clear about what platforms a game is coming to and want to continue the precedent," Booty said. "I think we've got a good system going, where we make it clear in Showcase."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们会非常清楚地标明游戏登陆哪些平台，并希望延续这一惯例，」Booty说。「我认为我们有一套很好的体系，在展示会上把这些说清楚。」

paragraphs.en: Sony, however, does not return the favor and include Xbox logos in trailers for games shown during its showcases, such as State of Play. So, while you'll see the PS5 logo on the Microsoft hosted trailers for the likes of Fable, Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, and even Halo: Campaign Evolved, you won't see the Xbox Series X and S logo on the same trailers hosted by Sony.
paragraphs.cn: 然而索尼并不会投桃报李——在其State of Play等展示会的游戏预告片中不会出现Xbox标志。因此，虽然你会在微软发布的《神鬼寓言》《使命召唤：现代战争4》甚至《光环：战役进化》预告片中看到PS5标志，但在索尼发布的同款预告片中不会看到Xbox Series X和S的标志。

paragraphs.en: The logo confirmation came amid much debate about the potential of Microsoft to return to exclusive games, although Sharma has given no indication so far that she plans to do so. Earlier this month, it was reported that Sharma was "treading carefully" as she worked out what to do with exclusive games, but Microsoft has said it will "reevaluate our approach to exclusivity," a tantalizing tease particularly for core fans who feel Xbox consoles have been devalued amid the company's multiplatform push in recent years.
paragraphs.cn: 标志确认消息正值外界热议微软是否会重回独占游戏策略之际，尽管夏尔玛目前没有任何这方面的表态。本月早些时候有报道称夏尔玛在独占游戏问题上「慎之又慎」，但微软表示将「重新评估我们的独占策略」——对于那些认为Xbox主机在近年多平台推进中被贬值的核心粉丝而言，这是一个诱人的暗示。

paragraphs.en: So, by highlighting the fact most of the games we'll see in the Xbox Game Showcase are also coming to PS5, Microsoft is hammering home the point that it has no actual exclusive games, unlike Sony, which is retreating further into console exclusivity having pulled back from PC. At least, that's the narrative coming from some hardcore Xbox fans, and it should be noted that Gears of War: E-Day is so far not confirmed for PS5.
paragraphs.cn: 因此，通过强调Xbox游戏展示会上大部分游戏也会登陆PS5，微软实际上在强化一个信息：它没有真正的独占游戏——不像索尼在从PC撤退后进一步拥抱主机独占。至少，这是部分核心Xbox粉丝的解读。值得注意的是，《战争机器：事变日》目前尚未确认登陆PS5。

paragraphs.en: Sharma reacted to disappointment specifically expressed by hardcore Xbox fan X / Twitter account Klobrille, who had said: "I feel like the bare minimum expectation many had was for Xbox to really focus on their own platform at least for the time of the Showcase."
paragraphs.cn: 夏尔玛专门回应了核心Xbox粉丝X/Twitter账号Klobrille表达的失望，后者曾说：「我觉得很多人最低限度的期望就是Xbox至少在展示会期间真正聚焦于自己的平台。」

paragraphs.en: Sharma tweeted: "Seeing the feedback on logos. It was a miss, and I own it. We are talking about how we adjust for future XBOX shows."
paragraphs.cn: 夏尔玛发推写道：「看到了关于标志的反馈。这是一次失误，我承担责任。我们正在讨论如何为未来的XBOX展示会做出调整。」

paragraphs.en: That response in itself has sparked discussion, with IGN's own Ryan McCaffrey wondering how exactly pretending a game doesn't exist on other platforms during your showcase helps gamers. "Exclusives are another matter, but if it's multiplatform, why try to convince anyone otherwise?" he tweeted. "IMHO the people that are upset about this are really just upset that those games aren't exclusive to Xbox. I don't think pretending something is exclusive during your Showcase when it's really not is particularly beneficial to anyone."
paragraphs.cn: 这一回应本身也引发了讨论。IGN的Ryan McCaffrey质疑：在展示会上假装一款游戏不存在于其他平台，对玩家到底有什么帮助？「独占是另一回事，但如果游戏本身就是多平台的，为什么要让人以为不是呢？」他发推说。「恕我直言，对此不满的人其实只是不满那些游戏没有Xbox独占。在展示会上假装某款游戏是独占的，对谁都没有好处。」

paragraphs.en: Others, though, are happy with the response. "XBOX Showcase needs to be for XBOX fans," said one fan. "You can't win over new fans or keep current fans when promoting you don't need an XBOX at your biggest spotlight of the year."
paragraphs.cn: 不过也有人对这一回应感到满意。「XBOX展示会应该是为XBOX粉丝准备的，」一位粉丝说。「当你在年度最大舞台上宣传'你不需要XBOX'时，你既赢不了新粉丝，也留不住老粉丝。」

paragraphs.en: Clearly, Sharma faces a tough job turning Xbox around financially while keeping hardcore fans on-side. It seems unlikely that Microsoft will all of a sudden ditch its multiplatform push, especially when it sees so much success on PS5 with the likes of the Forza Horizon games. As it stands, the big picture remains the same, whatever the case with logos. Earlier this week, Sharma reportedly warned staff that "hard choices" are ahead for Xbox. Reversing a decision you just reaffirmed a day earlier is just the start.
paragraphs.cn: 显然，夏尔玛面临着在扭转Xbox财务状况的同时留住核心粉丝的艰巨任务。微软不太可能突然放弃多平台战略，尤其是《极限竞速：地平线》等游戏在PS5上取得了巨大成功。无论标志问题如何解决，大局并未改变。本周早些时候，据报道夏尔玛警告员工Xbox「艰难的选择」即将到来。推翻一天前刚刚重申的决定，仅仅是个开始。

en_title: New Xbox Boss Says Decision to Continue to Show PS5 Logos During Its Xbox Games Showcase 'Was a Miss, and I Own It'
